narratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन में मिलिट्री इक्वीपमेंट्स की खरीद-फरोख्त में बड़ी धांधली हुई है.
narratives.reasoning: This quote directly accuses Ukraine of large-scale corruption in military procurement, which undermines the legitimacy and effectiveness of its government and military actions.

narratives.evidence_quote: आज यह बात जहजाहिर है कि पश्चिमी और यूरोपीय प्रतिबंधों का रूस पर ज्यादा कुछ असर नहीं हुआ.
narratives.reasoning: This statement declares that Western and European sanctions have been largely ineffective, directly criticizing and discrediting a core diplomatic and policy tool of the West.

narratives.narrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
narratives.evidence_quote: यूरोपीय देशों के रूसी एनर्जी पर निर्भरता ने यूरोपीय देशों को बड़ा झटका दिया.
narratives.reasoning: This highlights a specific adverse outcome (a major shock) for European countries due to their energy dependence on Russia, framing the West's actions as leading to negative consequences for itself.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Discrediting Ukrainian military
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेनी सेना के मैन पावर पांच लाख का है लेकिन इससे चार गुना बड़ी रूसी सेना के सामने वे दो साल से टिके हैं.
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote frames the Ukrainian military's survival as a surprise or anomaly against a vastly superior force, subtly undermining its inherent capability and resilience, implying it is only holding on due to the opponent's failure rather than its own strength.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Discrediting Ukrainian government and officials and policies
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन में मिलिट्री इक्वीपमेंट्स की खरीद-फरोख्त में बड़ी धांधली हुई है. ... यूक्रेन को भी भ्रष्टाचार के जांच को लेकर मिलिट्री अधिकारियों के देश छोड़ने पर रोक लगानी पड़ी.
subnarratives.reasoning: This directly alleges large-scale corruption and fraud within the Ukrainian military procurement system, portraying the government and its officials as corrupt and necessitating extreme measures like travel bans to control the situation.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Ukraine is a puppet of the West
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन इस मामले में पूरी तरह से पश्चिमी देशों पर निर्भर है
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement explicitly claims Ukraine is completely dependent on Western countries for military equipment, supporting the narrative that Ukraine lacks sovereignty and is controlled or heavily influenced by Western powers.

subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन अब भी मदद की उम्मीद लगाए हुआ है. आइए इस रिपोर्ट में हम यही जानेंगे कि आत्मनिर्भरता कितना अहम है और निर्भरता कैसे संकट पैदा कर सकता है.
subnarratives.reasoning: This frames Ukraine as a passive, dependent actor clinging to hope for external help, contrasting it with the virtue of self-reliance. It discredits Ukraine by portraying it as incapable and creating its own crisis through dependence, which supports the parent narrative but does not fit a more specific subcategory.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: The West is weak
subnarratives.evidence_quote: हालांकि, फिर भी वे व्लादिमीर पुतिन को रोक पाने में विफल रहे और आज यह बात जहजाहिर है कि पश्चिमी और यूरोपीय प्रतिबंधों का रूस पर ज्यादा कुछ असर नहीं हुआ।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly states that Western and European sanctions have failed to stop Putin and have had little effect on Russia, presenting the West's primary punitive tool as ineffective and thus portraying the West as weak and non-potent.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: The EU is divided
subnarratives.evidence_quote: मसलन, शुरुआती दौर में देखा गया कि कई यूरोपीय देशों ने रूस पर दबाव बनाने के नजरिए से पश्चिमी खेमे में चले गए लेकिन तुरंत ही उन्हें ऊर्जा संकट ने घेर लिया।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote highlights that European countries initially joined the Western bloc to pressure Russia but were immediately hit by an energy crisis, implying their actions were not unified or sustainable due to differing vulnerabilities and interests, thus presenting the EU as a set of divided entities.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: रूस ने जब यूक्रेन पर हमले किए, तो पश्चिमी और यूरोपीय देशों में एक आत्ममुग्धता का भाव था, जिससे वे यह समझकर चल रहे थे कि पूरी दुनिया पुतिन पर दबाव बनाने में पश्चिम का साथ देंगी, लेकिन ऐसा नहीं हुआ।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement discredits the West by accusing it of self-absorbed arrogance and miscalculation in expecting global support against Putin, which did not materialize. It supports the parent narrative of discrediting Western diplomacy but does not fit neatly into the more specific subnarrative definitions provided.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West: Sanctions imposed by Western countries will backfire
subnarratives.evidence_quote: हालांकि, फिर भी वे व्लादिमीर पुतिन को रोक पाने में विफल रहे और आज यह बात जहजाहिर है कि पश्चिमी और यूरोपीय प्रतिबंधों का रूस पर ज्यादा कुछ असर नहीं हुआ।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement directly claims that Western and European sanctions have failed to stop Putin and have had little effect on Russia, which is a core argument for the 'sanctions will backfire' subnarrative, as it portrays the sanctions as ineffective and a strategic failure for the West.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: रूस यूक्रेन युद्ध की वजह से 2022 में यूरोप में ऊर्जा संकट पैदा हुई... यूरोपीय देशों के रूसी एनर्जी पर निर्भरता ने यूरोपीय देशों को बड़ा झटका दिया।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote describes a specific negative consequence for Europe (an energy crisis) caused by the conflict and Europe's own dependence on Russia, which supports the parent narrative of negative consequences for the West but does not fit the 'sanctions backfire' or 'refugee flows' definitions.
